audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L425 explicitly checks both `auctionStart == 0` (no auction) and `elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration` (expired auction), reverting with `InvalidAuction` in either case. `s_auctionStarts` is only ever assigned `block.timestamp` (L353) or deleted to 0 (L367), so no underflow in the elapsed-time calculation is possible. All code paths through `bid()` reach this unconditional check before any state mutation.
